name: bandit.stalk_pressure_waits_for_opening
description: Fixture-backed camp-map product proof: a scout-confirmed target has an active stalk/pressure lead waiting for a named opening. The real 30-minute live cadence must name the absent opening, reject a new dogpile dispatch, hold/return/decay the lead, and persist no active outside group.
artifact_patterns: hold: active stalk pressure found no opening and should return/decay
camp-map dispatch blocked: remembered risk/reward decision held pressure

steps.label: post_load_no_opening_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the active stalk-pressure no-opening fixture; this proves only startup/load and fixture footing before the cadence wait
steps.failure_rule: If the gameplay screen is not visible after load, later no-opening cadence evidence cannot be credited.

steps.label: preflight_saved_active_stalk_pressure_lead
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not contain an active remembered stalk-pressure lead with no outside group before live cadence proof starts
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains an active camp-map lead that represents a bounded stalk/pressure wait for an opening, with no active outside members before the live cadence attempts another pressure beat
steps.failure_rule: If the active lead footing is missing or malformed, a later no-opening rejection cannot be credited as stalk-pressure behavior.

steps.label: wait_30_minutes_for_no_opening_cadence
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu
steps.expected_visible_fact: the player waited through the real 30-minute overmap NPC cadence window; feature credit depends on same-run debug artifact lines naming the absent opening and held pressure
steps.failure_rule: If the wait is interrupted or the artifact delta lacks the no-opening rejection, this scenario is inconclusive/red.

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt_after_no_opening_hold
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after the no-opening hold probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit cannot be opened, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as a clean saved-state proof.

steps.label: confirm_save_quit_after_no_opening_hold
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit confirmation completed after the no-opening hold probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit confirmation is unproven, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as fully green without reviewing cleanup status.

steps.label: audit_saved_no_opening_hold_decay
steps.abort_reason: saved bandit_live_world did not persist the expected no-opening result: no active outside group plus stale/decayed remembered lead
steps.expected_immediate_state: after save/quit, saved bandit_live_world has no active stalk dispatch, and the remembered lead is stale with one confidence point decayed and a no-opening return/hold outcome
steps.failure_rule: If active outside state remains or lead status/confidence/outcome did not change, the no-opening hold/decay result cannot be credited.

steps.label: audit_no_opening_hold_artifact
required_line_patterns: hold: active stalk pressure found no opening and should return/decay
camp-map dispatch blocked: remembered risk/reward decision held pressure
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not show remembered-lead source, named absent opening, no live signal, and held pressure instead of a new active dispatch
steps.failure_rule: No no-opening stalk-pressure credit if the artifact lacks the named opening state and held-pressure rejection line from the same run.

evidence_contract.claim: a remembered stalk/pressure lead waits for a named opening through the real live cadence and, when no opening appears, holds/returns/decays instead of spawning another active group or hovering forever
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for no-opening stalk-pressure behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No feature-proof credit if startup/load, saved preflight active lead, real wait/cadence action, same-run no-opening rejection artifact, save/writeback, and saved no-active-group plus stale/decayed lead state are not all green/matched.
